column1: Since civilisation began, music__________an important part in people's lives. (PLAY)
Even before musical instruments, people___________and clapped their hands. (SING)
It is also very relaxing, although some music, such as pop music, can be a lot___________than other kinds. (NOISY)
There are probably hundreds of millions of people around the world_____________to music at this moment. (LISTEN)
Being able to make music also__________a lot of pleasure. (BRING)
In the past, it_______________years and years og practice to learn how to play a musical instruments. (TAKE)
Today, it's very easy for anyone who____________a computer to make music. (HAVE)
